items.name: White Oxford Shirt

items.name: Breton Striped Top
items.description: Navy-blue and white horizontally striped breton long-sleeve cotton top with a boat neckline; even stripe width throughout.
items.prompt_hint: The horizontal stripes must stay evenly spaced and follow the body's contours; do not change stripe width, direction or colors.

items.name: Emerald Wrap Midi Dress
items.description: Emerald-green wrap midi dress with a V-neckline, short flutter sleeves, a tie waist with a side bow, and a flowing skirt that falls below the knee.

items.name: Black A-Line Dress

items.name: Light-Blue Straight Jeans
items.description: Light-blue straight-leg denim jeans with a five-pocket design, visible contrast stitching and a faded wash on the thighs.
items.prompt_hint: Replace only the lower-body garment; keep the person's existing top exactly as it is.
